findings.detail: Pure Python mathematical computations. Zero LLM calls, zero network I/O, zero file I/O. All formulas are deterministic and auditable.

MPPM: guards against gamma==1.0 and avg<=0. Calmar: mdd_floor = max(max_drawdown, 0.001). Omega: losses==0 returns 10.0. CAGR: days<=0 returns 0.0. Sharpe: variance<=0 returns 0.0. Correlation: std_i>0 and std_j>0 checks. All protected.
_normalize_mppm() handles float('-inf') → 0.0 and math.isnan() → 0.0. Calmar capped at 100.0. Omega capped at 10.0. Composite deflated scores clamped at 0.0. No NaN propagation risk.

MPPM uses log-exp formulation — safe for typical return ranges. Binomial test in collusion_detector uses log-gamma for combinatorial stability. Holm-Bonferroni uses step-down correction — safe for multiple comparisons.
datetime.now(timezone.utc) used in detect_plateau() (insight drought calculation) and check_reset_eligibility() (rolling window calculations). No bare datetime.now() calls.
